mitre_tactics.justification: Exploitation for Client Execution (Execution) — Exploitation of software vulnerability in client applications to achieve code execution. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution
mitre_tactics.justification: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution (Persistence) — Malicious code configured to execute automatically at system boot or user logon. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
mitre_tactics.justification: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation (Privilege Escalation) — Exploitation of software vulnerability to elevate privileges within the environment. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Credentials from Password Stores
mitre_tactics.justification: Credentials from Password Stores (Credential Access) — Passwords extracted from browser credential stores, keychains, or password managers. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.
